scenes.speaker: narrator
scenes.text: It was a regular Monday morning at the office. Everything seemed normal, until lunchtime.

scenes.speaker: mike
scenes.text: Alright, who took my lunch from the fridge? I had a perfectly good chicken sandwich in there, and now it's gone!

scenes.speaker: sarah
scenes.text: Mike, calm down. Are you sure you didn't leave it at home? You forget things all the time.

scenes.speaker: mike
scenes.text: No, Sarah! I specifically remember putting it on the second shelf! Someone in this office is a lunch thief!

scenes.speaker: narrator
scenes.text: Mike stormed through the office, interrogating every single person. Meanwhile, Sarah decided to check the security cameras.

scenes.speaker: sarah
scenes.text: Mike... you might want to come see this. The camera shows YOU eating the sandwich at seven AM this morning. You came in early, ate it, and apparently forgot.

scenes.speaker: mike
scenes.text: Oh no. I was on autopilot. I am so sorry everyone. I owe you all coffee.

scenes.speaker: sarah
scenes.text: Make mine a double espresso! And maybe label your lunch next time, genius.

scenes.speaker: narrator
scenes.text: And that's how Mike became the office legend. The man who stole his own lunch.
